message:
refactor(registry): centralize function metadata in import registry

- Move NO_ALLOC_FUNCS and NEEDS_TRY_NO_ALLOC from calls.zig to registry
- Add FunctionMeta struct with no_alloc and returns_error flags
- Add needs_init flag to ImportInfo for module initialization
- Use registry.getFunctionMeta() instead of hardcoded string lists
- Generic module init loop using registry.needs_init flag

No more hardcoded module names in codegen - all metadata in registry.
